title: ERP Finance HR Marketing Opportunity Map
summary: Provides a cross-functional Business Value map across ERP, finance, HR, marketing, growth, and leadership so Joz can explain AI opportunities in operational terms.
claims: A cross-functional opportunity map is the most practical way to extend Joz for Business Value.
ERP, finance, HR, marketing, and leadership each have distinct AI opportunity areas with direct operational relevance.
Joz should talk about AI opportunities in terms leaders and operators can act on immediately.
proof_points: This structure is consistent with the existing business-need and decision-intelligence direction in the corpus.
The map converts abstract AI language into function-level business opportunities.
It aligns with Joz's workflow, operating-model, and enterprise-transformation positioning.
